findings.finding: design-critic technical-1: INT-deny-response.permissionDecisionReason retains changelog language Updated to reference the bypass mechanism instead of plugin disablement instead of an implementable content contract
findings.match_reason: GAP-15 specified brief denial reason referencing bypass mechanism, but the actual artifact text reads Updated to reference the bypass mechanism instead of plugin disablement — changelog phrasing. No gap describes this residual authoring artifact in the interface field.

findings.finding: technical-critic technical-critic-1: CMP-block-skill-internals responsibility Pattern-match tool input paths against protected file names does not specify that path extraction requires checking different JSON fields per tool (file_path for Read, pattern for Glob, path for Grep)
findings.match_reason: GAP-10 added Glob/Grep bypass scenarios. GAP-22 and GAP-32 added per-tool payload formats to infra. But the technical component responsibility text itself still omits the multi-field extraction contract.

findings.finding: requirements-critic REQUIREMENTS-1: SCN-bypass-not-set and SCN-bypass-empty-string each contain a second then-clause asserting denial message content, coupling REQ-env-var-bypass and CAP-actionable-denial assertions in a single scenario
findings.match_reason: GAP-9 split SCN-denial-shows-bypass-instructions but explicitly did not address these two scenarios. Both still carry a second then-clause about denial message content.

findings.finding: requirements-critic REQUIREMENTS-2: REQ-updated-denial-message rule body retains to bypass the hook for the session — internal implementation terminology
findings.match_reason: GAP-29 removed systemMessage from the rule. GAP-26 removed hook from user-impact. Neither addressed the hook in bypass the hook for the session in the rule body itself.

findings.finding: requirements-coverage-critic REQUIREMENTS-COVERAGE-1: No scenario verifies that Grep is denied when FSM_BYPASS is not set; SCN-bypass-active-grep only verifies the allow path
findings.match_reason: GAP-10 added bypass-only Grep scenarios. No resolved gap adds a Grep denial scenario.

findings.finding: validation-critic REQUIREMENTS-COVERAGE-1: CAP-actionable-denial denial message verification exists only for Glob scenarios; no Grep denial scenario verifies actionable message for the distinct tool_input.path code branch
findings.match_reason: Overlaps with requirements-coverage-critic finding but frames it as CAP-actionable-denial coverage gap. No resolved gap addresses absence of Grep denial scenario under either capability.

findings.finding: verification-critic TESTABILITY-1: SCN-bypass-active-grep payload uses directory path /path/to/skills/ which may not match any blocked file pattern, making bypass assertion trivially pass
findings.match_reason: GAP-32 corrected field names but explicitly did not address whether the directory path triggers blocking. Infra artifact confirms directory path in SCN-bypass-active-grep payload.

findings.finding: design-for-test-critic INFRA-1: Manual test procedure payloads omit tool_name field present in real PreToolUse hook invocations; if hook routes on tool_name, payloads would not reproduce real invocations
findings.match_reason: No resolved gap addresses whether hook script uses tool_name for routing. GAP-2, GAP-14, GAP-22, GAP-32 refined payloads but none documented presence or absence of tool_name.

findings.finding: code-tasks-critic tasks-critic-1: TSK-update-denial-message applies unified language to both fields, obscuring that INT-deny-response makes systemMessage and permissionDecisionReason qualitatively different
findings.match_reason: GAP-15 differentiated the two fields in INT-deny-response. GAP-3 and GAP-34 modified TSK-verify-bypass (verification task), not TSK-update-denial-message (implementation task). No gap targeted TSK-update-denial-message description.

findings.finding: test-tasks-critic TASKS-1: TSK-verify-bypass denial scenarios 5-8 omit exit code assertion; bypass scenarios 1-4 explicitly state exits 0 empty stdout but denial scenarios only state deny JSON emitted
findings.match_reason: GAP-3 added content verification. GAP-34 enumerated all 8 scenarios. Neither added exit code assertions to denial scenarios. Infra testing-strategy requires hook exits 0 for denial scenarios.

findings.finding: test-infra-critic TASKS-INFRA-1: TSK-verify-bypass deny JSON emitted shorthand does not mandate the three-field structural verification that infra testing-strategy explicitly requires
findings.match_reason: GAP-3, GAP-16, GAP-34 all addressed TSK-verify-bypass content but none added structural JSON field verification. Infra requires stdout contains JSON with decision, systemMessage, and permissionDecisionReason fields.
